source.book: 《9分达人雅思听力真题还原及解析6》

segments.text: Today I'm going to talk about my research on learner persistence.
segments.translation: 今天我要讲的是我关于学习者坚持性（learner persistence）的研究。

segments.text: Let me first introduce why I wanted to carry out such research.
segments.translation: 我先来介绍一下我为什么想做这样一项研究。

segments.text: As a university teacher, I found learners' responses to certain things vary a lot.
segments.translation: 作为一名大学老师，我发现学生们对某些事情的反应差别很大。

segments.text: For example, some students may completely give up their degree studies because of a temporary illness, while others may overcome all kinds of difficulties and try their best to continue their studies.
segments.translation: 比如说，有些学生可能因为一场暂时的疾病就彻底放弃了学位学业，而另一些学生却能克服种种困难，尽全力坚持学下去。

segments.text: The latter are the students with learner persistence, and this is the group that I'm particularly interested in.
segments.translation: 后者就是具备学习者坚持性的学生，也正是我特别感兴趣的这一群体。

segments.text: To do the research, first I selected my undergraduate students as the research sample, with a total of 200 people.
segments.translation: 为了做这项研究，我首先选取了我的本科生作为研究样本，一共200人。

segments.text: All the students selected were seniors, and they had already stayed the course very well.
segments.translation: 被选中的都是大四学生，他们已经把整个课程坚持得相当好了。

segments.text: Although the sample was drawn from a range of ages, there were deliberately a large number of mature students.
segments.translation: 虽然样本涵盖了不同年龄段，但我特意选了很多成年学生（mature students）。

segments.text: And there was one thing in common – all of those students were living at home in the local region.
segments.translation: 而且他们有一个共同点——所有这些学生都住在本地区的家里。

segments.text: I wanted to maintain this element of consistency, so I didn't include those coming from outside this area.
segments.translation: 我想保持这一致性因素，所以没有把来自本地区以外的学生纳入进来。

segments.text: Then I designed a questionnaire that aimed to find out what their concerns had been when they began the course and then what had made them stick at the three-year studies in university.
segments.translation: 然后我设计了一份问卷，目的是弄清楚他们刚开始上课时都有哪些顾虑，以及后来是什么让他们坚持完了大学三年的学业。

segments.text: Findings from the first section pointed out there were different concerns when they started their university studies.
segments.translation: 第一部分的调查结果显示，他们在开始大学学业时有着各种不同的顾虑。

segments.text: For example, some worried about the financial circumstances, while others were concerned about their careers after graduation.
segments.translation: 比如说，有些人担心经济状况，另一些人则担心毕业后的职业问题。

segments.text: However, the research found the biggest concern for mature students tended to be the relationship with their children at home.
segments.translation: 不过研究发现，成年学生最大的顾虑往往是他们和家里孩子的关系。

segments.text: Next I wanted to find out what had made those students persist with their university studies.
segments.translation: 接下来我想弄清楚是什么让这些学生坚持完成了大学学业。

segments.text: So in the second part, I designed my questionnaire under three main headings: social and environmental factors, other factors, and personal characteristics.
segments.translation: 所以在第二部分，我把问卷分成了三大类：社会与环境因素、其他因素，以及个人特质。

segments.text: And I included three levels of importance for each of these three headings.
segments.translation: 而且我给这三大类每一类都设了三个重要程度的等级。

segments.text: At the first level, those points identified by the respondents were regarded as the most important in learner persistence.
segments.translation: 在第一等级，被受访者选出的那些因素被视为在学习者坚持性中最重要的。

segments.text: Let's look at them one by one.
segments.translation: 我们来一个一个看。

segments.text: For the first column, that's the social and environmental factors.
segments.translation: 第一栏，也就是社会与环境因素。

segments.text: A significant number of students said it was crucial to have effective support, whether from their tutors or friends.
segments.translation: 相当多的学生表示，得到有效的支持至关重要，无论是来自导师还是朋友的支持。

segments.text: For other factors, students were driven not so much by high grades, but by what they regarded as a success in their studies.
segments.translation: 至于其他因素，学生们的动力与其说来自高分，不如说来自他们自己所认为的学业上的成功。

segments.text: This was quite different from what I'd expected.
segments.translation: 这跟我原先预想的很不一样。

segments.text: Regarding personal characteristics, a sizable percentage of participants said they liked to take up a challenge, which was seen as a very important factor.
segments.translation: 在个人特质方面，相当大比例的参与者表示他们喜欢迎接挑战，这被看作是一个非常重要的因素。

segments.text: Then at the second level of importance, in the first category, many of the respondents regarded the life they enjoyed at school as an important social factor because this gave them good experiences.
segments.translation: 再看第二等级的重要因素，在第一类里，很多受访者把在学校享受到的生活视为一个重要的社会因素，因为这给了他们美好的经历。

segments.text: In the second column, other factors, a lot of people said that the most significant thing was decent health, which was also conducive to their persistence in the studies.
segments.translation: 在第二栏，也就是其他因素里，很多人说最重要的是身体健康，这同样有助于他们坚持学业。

segments.text: And then under the third column, quite a number of respondents had the same view that they should have a range of interests in their everyday lives because this could broaden their minds and give them a sense of perspective which less persistent learners might lack.
segments.translation: 然后在第三栏之下，相当多的受访者持有同样的观点，认为自己在日常生活中应该有广泛的兴趣爱好，因为这能开阔视野，让他们拥有一种坚持性较差的学习者可能缺乏的全局观。

segments.text: And then onto the third level of importance, under social factors, several respondents said that they had been keeping close to their tutors in their three-year university studies.
segments.translation: 接着到第三等级的重要因素，在社会因素之下，有几位受访者说他们在大学三年里一直和导师保持着密切联系。

segments.text: In the second column, for other factors, they mentioned it was very important to live in a family without any problems.
segments.translation: 在第二栏其他因素里，他们提到生活在一个没有任何问题的家庭里非常重要。

segments.text: And finally, under column three, they talked about the capacity for multi-tasking, which was the ability to simultaneously deal with different problems.
segments.translation: 最后，在第三栏之下，他们谈到了多任务处理的能力，也就是同时应对不同问题的本领。

segments.text: From these findings, I've concluded some recommendations on how to promote students' learner persistence.
segments.translation: 根据这些调查结果，我总结出了几条关于如何提升学生学习者坚持性的建议。

segments.text: Primarily, I suggest that we should distribute questionnaires to the freshmen, so as to make clear of their maturity when they begin the course.
segments.translation: 首先，我建议我们应该向大一新生发放问卷，以便在他们开始上课时就摸清他们的成熟度。

segments.text: This is really our most important concern.
segments.translation: 这确实是我们最重要的关切点。

segments.text: Secondly, I propose that we should find ways to offer some training sessions to the students who are selected to encourage them to play the role of advisors.
segments.translation: 其次，我提议我们应该想办法给被选中的学生提供一些培训课程，鼓励他们扮演顾问的角色。

segments.text: The purpose of this is to make support much more approachable to other students.
segments.translation: 这么做的目的是让其他学生更容易获得支持。

segments.text: Thirdly, in the evening and night when offices are closed, students may have no one to turn to for help.
segments.translation: 第三，到了办公室关门的傍晚和夜里，学生们可能会求助无门。

segments.text: As a result, I think we should provide online services to those in need.
segments.translation: 因此，我认为我们应该为那些有需要的学生提供在线服务。

segments.text: Researches have pointed out that this service is actually more accessible than traditional services.
segments.translation: 有研究指出，这种服务实际上比传统服务更方便获取。

segments.text: And finally, if students don't submit their assignments before the deadlines, I think we teachers should contact the students first, rather than waiting for the students to come to us.
segments.translation: 最后，如果学生没能在截止日期前提交作业，我觉得我们老师应该主动先去联系学生，而不是干等着学生来找我们。

segments.text: So, this is all I want to share on my research.
segments.translation: 好，关于我的研究我要分享的就这些了。

segments.text: Now let's turn to the next part.
segments.translation: 现在我们进入下一部分。

segments.text: Are there any questions about …
segments.translation: 关于……有什么问题吗？
